news.summary: During the first quarter, The Kroger Co. reported a 3.2% increase in identical sales excluding fuel. The company achieved an operating profit of $1,322 million and earnings per share (EPS) of $1.29. Adjusted FIFO operating profit stood at $1,518 million, with adjusted EPS at $1.49. eCommerce sales showed significant growth, rising by 15%. This information was released by the company on June 20, 2025, in Cincinnati.
news.headline: Kroger's Q1 2025 results: Identical sales up 3.2%, operating profit $1.32B, EPS $1.29, eCommerce sales up 15%.

$KR  Kroger Q1 2026 Earnings - Adj EPS $1.49 (est $1.45) - Sales $45.1B (est $45.23B) - Identical-Store Sales Ex-Fuel +3.2% (est +2.3%) - Still Sees FY Adj EPS $4.60 To $4.80 (est $4.74) - Still Sees FY Capex $3.68 To $3.88 (est $3.79B) - Sees FY Identical-Store Sales Ex-Fuel +2.25% To +3.25%

news.summary: KB Home has recently unveiled its latest community in Southeast Stockton, California. This sought-after location marks the grand opening of the new development, showcasing the company's commitment to building strong relationships with the community.
news.headline: KB Home opens new community in Southeast Stockton, California, focusing on desirable location.

news.summary: Village Caregiving (VCG), a home-care agency based in the United States, was recently recognized in the Top Workplaces 2025 in Middle Tennessee list by The Tennessean. With around 60 employees at its Nashville office, VCG secured the second position in the small-sized company category, among 55 other businesses. The company was honored with the "Doers Award" for its outstanding execution. The awards were presented at a ceremony in the evening.
news.headline: Village Caregiving in Middle TN named No. 2 in small company category among 55, with 60 employees, wins Doers Award.

news.summary: Newegg Commerce, Inc. revealed the launch of its 11th annual FantasTech Sale from July 7 to July 13. The event, which includes over 50 computer and electronics product categories, offers thousands of deals. The company, listed as NASDAQ: NEGG, emphasized the return of FantasTech Price Protection, introduced earlier this year. Customers can find products with the FantasTech Price Protection badge, granting them assurance while making purchases during this limited time period.
news.headline: Newegg's 11th FantasTech Sale offers thousands of tech deals from July 7 to 13, with Price Protection on qualifying items.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, ReposiTrak, Inc. (NYSE: TRAK), a leading food traceability and regulatory compliance network, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.01815 per quarter ($0.0726 per share annually) for shareholders on record by June 30, 2025. Shareholders will receive the cash dividends around August 14, 2025. This dividend payment marks a continuation of ReposiTrak's successful inventory management and out-of-stock reduction SaaS platform.
news.headline: ReposiTrak, Inc. (NYSE: TRAK) declares a $0.01815 quarterly dividend, $0.0726 annually, to be paid on August 14, 2025.

news.summary: If granted approval, nirogacestat would become the sole therapy authorized in the EU for treating desmoid tumors, making it a groundbreaking development in the medical field. This decision would provide patients in the EU with a much-needed treatment option for this rare and challenging condition.
news.headline: SpringWorks Therapeutics gets positive CHMP opinion for nirogacestat for adults with desmoid tumors, potentially first EU-approved therapy.

news.summary: Today, in Dallas, on June 20, 2025, Argent Trust Company announced as Trustee of the Permian Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: PBT) a cash distribution for holders of its units of beneficial interest. The declared amount is $0.012976 per unit, and the payment is scheduled for July 15, 2025.
news.headline: Permian Basin Royalty Trust announces June cash distribution of $0.012976 per unit, payable on July 15, 2025. #PermianBasinRoyaltyTrust

news.summary: AbbVie Inc. in North Chicago, Illinois announced through a press release on June 20, 2025, that their board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.64 per share for stockholders. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on August 15, 2025, to stockholders of record as of July 15, 2025. AbbVie Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ABBV. This move demonstrates the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders and maintaining financial stability.
news.headline: AbbVie Inc. declares $1.64 per share quarterly dividend, payable on August 15, 2025, to stockholders as of July 15, 2025.

news.summary: A prominent technology advisor, ARG, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, was recently acknowledged as one of The Washington Post's Top Workplaces for the year 2025. This prestigious recognition, which has been awarded to ARG for the 11th time, highlights the company's expertise in simplifying intricate IT choices.
news.headline: ARG named as a Top Workplace by Washington Post for the 11th time. Recognized for simplifying IT decisions.

news.summary: Envision Energy has won a bid to oversee an engineering, procurement, and construction endeavor for Kallista Energy in France. The undertaking involves establishing a 120-megawatt energy storage system in Saleux, France, that will furnish 240 megawatt hours of electricity. Envision Energy is set to deliver 44 DC units and 22...
news.headline: Envision Energy to supply 120 MW / 240 MWh energy storage project in Saleux, France for Kallista Energy.

Aethlon Medical, Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol AEMD, specializes in developing medical therapeutics for treating cancer and severe infectious diseases. The specific figures regarding their financial performance for the mentioned quarter were not revealed in the announcement.

news.headline: Countdown begins for 2026 Special Olympics USA Games in Minnesota, with 3,000 athletes set to compete. Fans encouraged to join celebration.

news.summary: The president has indicated that it may take a considerable amount of time before making a decision on participating in a potential military conflict with Iran. This uncertainty is not easing concerns for investors, who are closely monitoring the situation.
news.headline: Trump's 2-week Iran decision boosts markets, as he delays military involvement, stirring investor unease.

news.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited, a company listed on the ASX and NASDAQ under the ticker symbols TLX, has recently introduced AlFluor ™, a new PET 1 radiochemistry solution utilizing 18 F-aluminium fluoride (AlF). This innovative product was launched in Melbourne, Australia and Indianapolis on June 20, 2025.
news.headline: Telix launches AlFluor radiochemistry platform for PET imaging on June 20, 2025.

news.summary: PetVivo Holdings, Inc., a biomedical device company focusing on medical therapeutics for animals, including horses and dogs, announced the receipt of $3 million from a recent investment, as part of a larger offering to raise $5 million through the sale of convertible preferred stock. The company has already received $1 million prior to this investment, bringing their total received amount to $4 million. An additional $1 million investment option remains, which is expected to be exercised by June 26, 2025. Each share of Series B Convertible Preferred Stock is priced at $1, with a conversion rate of one share for one share of common stock in the company.
news.headline: PetVivo Holdings received $3 million from investor exercising purchase option, total raised $4 million; additional $1 million pending.

news.summary: Unity Bank has expanded its community banking reach across the region with the opening of its 22nd branch. This move underscores the bank's commitment to serving local communities and meeting their financial needs. By establishing its 22nd branch, Unity Bank is poised to further strengthen its presence in the region and provide greater accessibility to its services for customers. This expansion highlights the bank's dedication to fostering relationships with customers and delivering personalized financial solutions.
news.headline: Unity Bank opens 22nd branch in Madison, New Jersey, expanding its presence in the region and community banking.

news.summary: According to recent data, there has been a surge in unemployment rates in the region, with over 10,000 people losing their jobs in the past month. The current unemployment rate stands at 6.5%, a significant increase from the previous month. This rise in unemployment is mainly attributed to the economic downturn caused by the ongoing pandemic. The government has stated that they are implementing measures to address this issue and provide support to those affected. Additionally, there has been a noticeable decrease in consumer spending, with a 15% drop in retail sales compared to last year. This has had a major impact on local businesses, many of which are struggling to stay afloat.Experts are predicting that the situation may worsen in the coming months if the current trend continues.
news.headline: New community, Boone Trail Village, announced by LGI Homes in Lillington, NC for peaceful living.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Gaithersburg-based BullFrog AI Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BFRG; BFRGW) revealed that Dr. Juan Felipe Beltrán, their AI, Machine Learning, and Innovation Director, will speak at the upcoming XTalks webinar titled "AI in Bioinformatics: Overcoming Pitfalls in Statistical, ML, and Generative AI Approaches." BullFrog AI is a tech-driven drug development firm leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning for successful pharmaceutical and biologics innovation. This development showcases the company's commitment to advancing AI applications in the medical sector.
news.headline: BullFrog AI's Dr. Beltrán will discuss AI strategies in bioinformatics at XTalks webinar on June 20.

news.summary: CHAR Technologies Ltd. ("CHAR Tech") a renowned sustainable energy solutions company, has recently disclosed that its Board of Directors has given the green light for the modification of a maximum of 2,750,000 common share purchase warrants. These warrants, initially part of the Unit Offering with ArcelorMittal XCARB S.à r.l‎., were established with an exercise price of $0.70 and an expiry date set for July 5 th , 2025, as announced on July 5 th , 2023. Effective June 20 th , 2025, the Warrants held by ArcelorMittal will now have an extended expiry date until July 5 th , 2026. The warrant extension remains pending final approval from the TSX Venture Exchange, and the funds generated from warrant exercises will be allocated towards general corporate needs.
news.headline: CHAR Tech extends 2,750,000 common share purchase warrants with exercise price of $0.70; ArcelorMittal's warrants extended to July 5, 2026.

news.summary: The inaugural international conference is a collaborative effort by the Prader-Willi Syndrome Association | USA, the Foundation for Prader-Willi Research, and the International Prader-Willi Syndrome Organisation. This groundbreaking event marks the first time these organizations have come together to host a joint meeting. With participants from around the world, the conference aims to advance research and support efforts for individuals with Prader-Willi Syndrome. It is a significant milestone in raising awareness and fostering collaboration among key stakeholders in the PWS community.
news.headline: Soleno Therapeutics to present at 2025 United in Hope Conference hosted by Prader-Willi Syndrome Association|USA, Foundation for Prader-Willi Research, and International Prader-Willi Syndrome Organisation.

news.summary: The new report reveals that the unemployment rate dropped to 3.9%, with the economy adding 250,000 jobs last month. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2% and a substantial increase in job creation compared to the previous month. Additionally, the report indicates a growth in the average hourly earnings by 2.7% in the last year. This positive trend in the labor market reflects a strengthening economy and provides optimism for future growth.
news.headline: Lifetime Brands, Inc. reveals outcomes of 2025 annual gathering.

news.summary: In Shanghai on June 20, 2025, Bilibili Inc. declared that all Proposed Resolutions outlined in the AGM Notice dated April 11, 2025, were approved at the annual general meeting. Bilibili, a prominent video community for Chinese youth, operates under Nasdaq: BILI and HKEX: 9626. The meeting in Shanghai solidified these resolutions for the iconic brand.
news.headline: Bilibili Inc. reports successful adoption of Proposed Resolutions at AGM in Shanghai, China today. Nasdaq: BILI, HKEX: 9626.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Morocco Strategic Minerals Corporation (TSXV: MCC) initiated its first drilling program on the Timarighine property in the eastern Anti-Atlas region of Morocco. The previous exploration phase revealed significant copper mineralization and a strong structural framework conducive to expansion. This marks an important development for the corporation as it ventures into drilling activities in a promising area for minerals.
news.headline: Morocco Strategic Minerals launches maiden drill program in Timarighine property, confirming high-grade copper mineralization.

news.summary: Valencia, California - On June 20, 2025, renowned luxury cruise brand Cunard is marking its 185th anniversary with a special promotion. The 185th Anniversary Sale offers fares from $899 per person with an additional $185 in Onboard Credit per stateroom. This promotion is applicable to 185 different voyages. Don't miss out on this limited-time offer available now.
news.headline: Cunard celebrates 185th anniversary with a sale: fares start at $899 per person plus $185 onboard credit on 185 voyages.

The survey by the leading preventive care provider discovered interesting findings that showcase unique trends among pet owners in different states.

news.summary: In Columbus, Georgia, on June 20, 2025, Aflac Incorporated (NYSE: AFL) announced the detection of suspicious activity on their U.S. network on June 12, 2025. The company quickly activated their cyber incident response procedures and successfully halted the intrusion in a matter of hours. The prompt action taken by Aflac ensured the protection of their business operations.
news.headline: Aflac Inc. detected cyber intrusion on June 12, 2025 and responded promptly. Business operations unaffected.

news.summary: A company based in Janesville, Wisconsin, has announced significant commercial expansion, now catering to customers across 19 different countries. SHINE Technologies, specializing in nuclear fusion technology and medical isotopes, is gearing up for its next phase of development. This includes the submission of a proposal to the European Medicines Agency (EMA) and the acquisition of SPECT. The company's growth is indicative of its success and strong presence in the global market.
news.headline: SHINE's Ilumira celebrates one-year milestone with commercial growth in 19 countries, EMA submission, and SPECT acquisition.

news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida on June 20, 2025, Thompson Thrift, a well-known real estate company and a top multifamily developer in the US, celebrated the opening of The Hadley. This new luxury for-rent villa community in North Port introduces 268 units to the flourishing area.
news.headline: Thompson Thrift unveils 268-unit luxury for-rent villa community in North Port, Florida. #TheHadley #RealEstate #Multifamily

news.summary: Today, in Dallas, Argent Trust Company announced a cash distribution for holders of units of beneficial interest in the Cross Timbers Royalty Trust (NYSE: CRT). The declared distribution is $0.035849 per unit and is scheduled to be paid out on July 15, 2025. This announcement pertains to all unitholders of the Trust.
news.headline: Cross Timbers Royalty Trust declares cash distribution of $0.035849 per unit, payable on July 15, 2025 to unitholders.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, ActiveOps, a prominent company specializing in AI-powered Decision Intelligence for various sectors including banking, insurance, BPOs, and healthcare, has been named the Official Data Analytics Partner for The British & Irish Lions and the Qatar Airways British & Irish Lions Men's Tour. This partnership signifies a significant collaboration in the sports industry.
news.headline: ActiveOps named data analytics partner for British & Irish Lions and tour to Australia 2025.#OfficialPartner #DecisionIntelligence

news.summary: Fides Treasury Services Ltd. has achieved a significant milestone by winning the Global Finance award for the fourth consecutive time, showcasing their unmatched expertise in treasury technology innovation. This leading company based in Zurich has been recognized for their excellence in multibank connectivity, payments, and communications. The award was received on June 20, 2025. Fides was honored with the title of Best Cross-Border Payments, solidifying their position as a key player in the industry. This recognition underscores their commitment to providing top-notch services and solutions.
news.headline: Fides ONEHub wins 4th Global Finance award, showcasing excellence in cross-border payments tech.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that a total of 10 people were injured in a car crash on the interstate highway. Among those injured, 5 individuals were taken to the hospital with serious injuries, while the remaining 5 were treated on the scene for minor injuries. The accident occurred when a speeding car collided with several vehicles during rush hour traffic. Emergency services responded promptly to the scene, providing medical assistance and clearing the roadway for traffic to resume. The authorities are investigating the cause of the crash to determine any potential charges against the driver responsible. The incident caused significant delays on the highway, with traffic backed up for several miles.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs and Citigroup expect Europe's economy to drive a stock market surge. - Financial news.

news.summary: Aptose has recently signed a new loan agreement with Hanmi Pharmaceutical to ensure the development of Tuspetinib in triplet therapy for Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) can progress effectively. This agreement will provide Aptose with $XX in funding to support the research and development efforts related to Tuspetinib. The collaboration between the two companies aims to advance the potential treatment options for AML patients by exploring the effectiveness of Tuspetinib in combination with other therapies. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in the battle against AML and highlights the commitment of both Aptose and Hanmi Pharmaceutical to advancing innovative solutions in the field of oncology.
news.headline: Aptose and Hanmi team up for new loan to advance Tuspetinib in Triple Therapy for AML.

news.summary: Scope Ratings GmbH, known as Scope, has lowered the issuer rating of UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos”, a closed-end investment company for informed investors, from B+ to B-. Additionally, Scope has reduced the senior unsecured debt rating of the company from BB- to B.
news.headline: "Scope Ratings downgrades UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" issuer rating from B+ to B- and senior unsecured debt rating from BB- to B."
